title.label: Title / Kaveri
title.finding: Registered sale deed shows 179 acres Kannehalli land in promoter's wife's name — undisclosed beneficial interest. 4.5 acres Devanahalli survey 84/1A transferred 8 months post-RERA registration without disclosure.

land.label: Land Records / Bhoomi
land.finding: Bhoomi RTC shows agricultural land (3B) conversion approval revoked by DC office Oct 2021. Land reclassified as B-Kharab (govt land). Promoter has not updated K-RERA records.

litigation.label: Litigation / eCourts
litigation.finding: 14 active cases: HC WP 28812/2023 (homebuyer class action), CC 441/2024 (ED FEMA attachment ₹423.38 Cr), CRL 12/2024 (promoter fraud IPC 420). No stay on possession orders.

bbmp.label: Plan Sanction / BBMP
bbmp.finding: BDA plan sanction expired Dec 2020. Promoter filed renewal Mar 2023 — rejected on grounds of pending DC conversion. 92 Avenue and 13 Aqua-2 flats built without valid plan sanction.

encroachment.label: Encroachment / Sat.
encroachment.finding: 2023 satellite imagery shows 6.2-acre rajakaluve (stormwater drain) buffer zone encroached. BBMP served demolition notice Jan 2024 on 3 towers. Survey 85/3 boundary overlaps with adjacent government kharab land.

title_chain.event: Original Patta granted to Muniyamma (agricultural, 3B)
Sale to K. Suresh Kumar ₹4.2L, registered Deed 4812/94
Conversion order to Non-Agricultural issued (DC Office)
Sale to Ozone Urbana Pvt Ltd ₹28 Cr, Deed 2281/09
BDA plan sanction granted — 84/1, 84/2 (6.4 lakh sqft)
K-RERA registration — 1,847 units declared
179 acres Kannehalli (survey 112/1) transferred to promoter's wife, undisclosed in RERA
DC office revokes conversion — reclassified B-Kharab govt land
Possession deadline missed — 1,847 homebuyers unhoused
QPR Q3 2021 not filed — penalty clock starts ₹25,000/day
BBMP demolition notice on 3 towers — rajakaluve encroachment
ED attachment order — ₹423.38 Cr assets frozen (FEMA CC 441/2024)
K-RERA orders refund ₹927.22 Cr to all 1,847 homebuyers
HC stays refund order — promoter files stay petition HC WP 2812/2025

title.label: Title / Kaveri
title.finding: Kaveri records show a mortgage (simple mortgage deed 882/2018) of ₹8.4 Cr on survey 89/1A — not disclosed in K-RERA Form A. Lender (Vijaya Bank, now Bank of Baroda) not listed as mortgagee.

land.label: Land Records / Bhoomi
land.finding: Bhoomi RTC shows survey 89/1A split not reflected in K-RERA registration. 0.8 acres out of 3.8 acres classified as E-category (tank bed/catchment area) — not buildable under KLR Act.

litigation.label: Litigation / eCourts
litigation.finding: 4 active suits: OS 841/2023 (mortgagee Bank of Baroda foreclosure), MVC 228/2024 (neighbor boundary), 2 consumer complaints at K-RERA tribunal.

bbmp.label: Plan Sanction / BBMP
bbmp.finding: Plan sanction approved Dec 2019 for G+14 floors. Promoter constructed G+18 (4 floors excess). BBMP issued stop-work notice June 2023 — not vacated.

encroachment.label: Encroachment / Sat.
encroachment.finding: 2024 satellite imagery confirms construction on 0.8-acre E-category tank bed land. BBMP drainage department marked boundary February 2024.

title_chain.event: Patta in name of H. Narasimha (agricultural 3B)
Sale to R. Krishnamurthy ₹12L, Deed 1144/08
Conversion to Non-Agricultural (DC office)
Simple Mortgage Deed 882/2018 — ₹8.4 Cr Bank of Baroda (NOT disclosed)
Sale to Meridian Realty ₹2.8 Cr, Deed 3612/19 (mortgage not cleared)
K-RERA registration — 120 units, mortgage not disclosed in Form A
BBMP stop-work notice — 4 excess floors
Possession deadline missed — 108 buyers affected
Bank of Baroda files foreclosure suit OS 841/2024
